prompt: 生成一组复古的拟物化风格的{argument name="设备类型" default="老式电子设备"}的图标，图中配有图标名称
translatedPrompt: Generate a set of icons for {argument name="device type" default="vintage electronic equipment"} in a retro skeuomorphic style, with icon names included in the image.

breakdown.creativeCore: Vintage Skeuomorphic Icon Set：Generates a set of icons for vintage electronic devices in a retro skeuomorphic style with visible labels.
breakdown.subject: 产品
breakdown.bestUse: 图标包、贴纸、表情、产品功能图标

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 图标/贴纸 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: vintage, retro]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
包含标注/说明。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
